# 2.105 CSV order book data
Reading•
. Duration: 10 minutes
10 min

URL: https://www.coursera.org/learn/uol-object-oriented-programming/supplement/LfjXg/2-105-csv-order-book-data

Here is a link to a dataset you can use in your program, similar to the one used by the instructor in the videos. it and open it up so you can look at it while you watch the videos. 20200317 CSV File
